changelog: **Release notes now include the "📦 Download-only" section** — `.github/workflows/release.yml` injects the `download-extension.ps1` one-liners (latest, env-var pinned, local clone) into the auto-generated GitHub Release body, mirroring the root README. `${VER}` is interpolated so the pinned snippet always references the current release tag.
Version bump 3.25.0 → 3.26.0 across all 7 unified-version sites; README pin updated.
